- Add comments with weekly progress updates on cards so that the entire company can see what’s getting done.

card.desc:
Hey Renner, 

Here are the notes that we have taken so far. We will work on getting you a live document for future questions and concerns.

**Duplication/ Not Updated**

- ‌

- Upper Deer Creek - ‘Updated’ but nothing changed
- Merna North Daniel WY - got taken off market, scraper never got an update
- Hidden Homestead Pivot Farm - No Update but taken off market
- [https://mtlandsource.com/property/phillips/frenchman-creek-ranch](https://mtlandsource.com/property/phillips/frenchman-creek-ranch "smartCard-inline")
  - Sourcing sheet says this is $8mm, but the listing says its $420k
- [https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/4414-E-21st-St-Casper-WY-82609/69803698_zpid/](https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/4414-E-21st-St-Casper-WY-82609/69803698_zpid/ "smartCard-inline")
  - Not sure why this got pulled. ( Zillow was wrong so probably just Zillow's error and not the scraper) 

**Misc Questions** 

- How do we fully kill a property so it does not appear again vs. not interested but keep as a comp? Can we just mark as “Kill”
- Is there a way to make the links show up as hyperlinks so we don’t have to manually copy and paste each one
- Is there a way we can get properties w an MLS link to trace back to the website so that we don’t have to go find each of these via MLS
- I think we could screen out certain counties in far east Montana. Lets keep in for now but we may just choose not to look at certain counties
- New Columns - Can we add these to both Updated Listings and New Listings
  - Price Per Acre column
  - Sold / Under Contract / Pending
    - Anything that is marked as “Sold” should just automatically be coded as a comp. We don’t need to spend time looking at them
  - Notes
- What is being pulled in updated listings? Just price updates, listing updates, etc... (in pipeline already)
- Keep notes with property in the database so we don’t have to relearn these properties
- Screening parking lot (pending)
  - want to have these separate from pipeline

listings.description:
Do you sometimes need to add a bit more context to your work in Trello? The Confluence Cloud Power-Up helps provide the detail behind your work on a Trello card and the permanency to revisit what happened after the project is done. From blog posts, to meeting notes, to project requirements, Confluence let’s you create anything and organize the work that supports each task on a card.

Confluence pages support real-time comments and you can easily check the back of your Trello card to see how active your Confluence page is. Attachments, embedded media, and web links help to make Confluence pages beautiful and relevant.  Create Confluence pages from your Trello cards, so your projects always have all the information needed, easily available from your Trello board.

- Attach Confluence Cloud pages to Trello cards and get from your board to your drilled-down content in a single click.
- See all the activity on your page, who created a page and when it was created, including a snippet and the number of comments on the page, right from the card back.

### Screenshot

![Back of card Confluence section](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Attach Confluence pages to Trello cards to manage content, strategy, and ideas right in Trello.

listings.description:
Potřebuješ někdy své práci v Trellu dodat trošku více kontextu? Vylepšení jménem Confluence Cloud tvé práci v kartách na Trellu dodá potřebnou hloubku a stálost, aby ses ke své práci mohl/a vracet i po dokončení projektu. Confluence ti pomůže s tvorbou čehokoli od příspěvků na blogu, přes poznámky se schůze po projektové požadavky a navíc ti umožní organizovat práci a podpořit tak každý úkol na kartě.

Stránky Confluence podporují komentáře v reálném čase a k tomu si můžeš snadno kontrolovat zadní část karty Trello a zjišťovat, jak aktivní tvá stránka Confluence je. Pomocí příloh, vložených médií a webových odkazů budou tvé stránky Confluence krásné a relevantní. Vytvářej stránky Confluence ze svých karet Trello, aby tvé projekty obsahovaly vždy veškeré potřebné informace, snadno dostupné z tvé nástěnky Trello.

- Připojuj na karty Trello stránky Confluence Cloud a dostaň se jedním kliknutím ze své nástěnky ke svému podrobnému obsahu.
- Prohlížej si přímo ze zadní části karty veškerou aktivitu na své stránce, informace o tom, kdo vytvořil stránku a kdy byla vytvořena, včetně úryvků a počtu komentářů na stránce.

### Screenshot

![část Confluence, zadní strana karty](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Připojuj stránky Confluence na Trello karty a spravuj obsah, strategie a nápady přímo z Trella.

listings.description:
您是否有時需要為 Trello 的工作添加更多背景資訊？ Confluence Cloud Power-Up 有助於提供您在 Trello 卡片上工作的詳情，並讓您在專案完成後可以永久重新審視後續事件。從部落格貼文、會議記錄到專案需求，Confluence 能讓您建立任何內容，並組織支援卡片上每項任務的工作。

Confluence 頁面支援即時評論，您可以輕鬆查看 Trello 卡片背面以了解 Confluence 頁面的活動程度。附件、嵌入式媒體和網路連結有助於使 Confluence 頁面美觀且具關聯性。從 Trello 卡片建立 Confluence 頁面，這樣您的專案將能一直從 Trello 看板上輕鬆獲得需要的所有資訊。

- 只需單擊一下，就可以將 Confluence Cloud 頁面附加到 Trello 卡片上，並存取您的看板，獲得鉅細靡遺的內容。
- 直接從卡片背面查看您頁面上的所有活動、建立頁面的人員和建立頁面的時間，包括摘要以及頁面上的評論數量。

### 螢幕截圖

![卡片背面 Confluence 區段](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: 將 Confluence 頁面附加至 Trello 卡片，以便直接在 Trello 管理內容、策略和構想。

listings.description:
您是否有时候需要在 Trello 中为您的工作再添加一点环境？Confluence Cloud Power-Up 可帮助您提供 Trello 卡片上工作背后的详情和永久的事物，以便在项目完成后再次访问发生的情况。从博客帖子到会议记录、到项目要求，Confluence 让您能够创建一切，并组织在卡片上支持每项任务的工作。

Confluence 页面支持实时评论，您可以轻松检查 Trello 卡片背面，查看您的 Confluence 页面的活动情况。附件、嵌入的媒体和网页链接有助于让 Confluence 页面更美观、更有相关性。从 Trello 卡片创建 Confluence 页面吧，这样，您的项目始终都有所需要的所有信息（可从您的 Trello 面板轻松获得）。

- 将 Confluence Cloud 页面附加到 Trello 卡片，只需单击一下即可从您的面板获得深入的内容。

- 直接从卡片背面查看您的页面上的所有动态，谁创建了页面以及何时创建，包括片段和页面上的评论数量。

### 屏幕截图

![卡片 Confluence 部分的背面](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: 将 Confluence 页面附加到 Trello 卡片，直接在 Trello 中管理内容、战略和想法。

listings.description:
Đôi khi bạn có cần thêm một chút bối cảnh cho công việc của bạn trong Trello không? Power-Up Confluence Cloud giúp cung cấp chi tiết đằng sau công việc của bạn trên thẻ Trello và tính lâu dài để xem lại những gì đã xảy ra sau khi dự án hoàn thành. Từ các bài đăng trên blog, đến ghi chú cuộc họp, đến các yêu cầu của dự án, Confluence cho phép bạn tạo bất cứ thứ gì và sắp xếp công việc hỗ trợ từng nhiệm vụ trên thẻ.

Các trang Confluence hỗ trợ bình luận thời gian thực và bạn có thể dễ dàng kiểm tra mặt sau của thẻ Trello để xem trang Confluence của bạn hoạt động như thế nào. Các tệp đính kèm, phương tiện nhúng và các liên kết web làm cho các trang Confluence đẹp và phù hợp. Tạo các trang Confluence từ thẻ Trello của bạn, để các dự án của bạn luôn có tất cả thông tin cần thiết, dễ dàng có sẵn từ bảng Trello của bạn.

- Đính kèm các trang Confluence Cloud vào thẻ Trello và nhận từ bảng của bạn đến nội dung trong một cú nhấp chuột.
- Xem tất cả hoạt động trên trang của bạn, người đã một trang và khi hoạt động được tạo, bao gồm một đoạn trích và số bình luận trên trang, ngay từ mặt sau thẻ.

### Ảnh chụp màn hình

![Phía sau thẻ mục Confluence](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Đính kèm các trang Confluence vào thẻ Trello để quản lý nội dung, chiến lược và ý tưởng ngay trong Trello.

listings.description:
Інколи вам потрібно додати трохи більше контексту до своєї роботи в Trello? Доповнення Confluence Cloud надає докладну інформацію про вашу роботу на картці Trello, а також дозволяє вивчити результати вже після завершення проєкту. Від публікацій у блозі до протоколів засідань і вимог до проєкту — Confluence дозволяє створювати будь-які дані й організовувати роботу за всіма завданнями на картці.

Сторінки Confluence підтримують коментарі в реальному часі, і ви можете переглянути зворотній бік картки Trello, щоб дізнатися, наскільки активною є сторінка Confluence. Вкладення, медіафайли та вебпосилання допомагають робити сторінки Confluence красивими й актуальними. Створюйте сторінки Confluence зі своїх карток Trello, щоб ваші проєкти завжди мали всю потрібну інформацію, доступ до якої легко отримати з дошки Trello.

– Додавайте сторінки Confluence Cloud до карток Trello та переходьте з дошки до свого докладного вмісту всього за один клік.
– На зворотному боці картки ви можете переглянути всі дії на сторінці, дізнатися, хто і коли її створив, переглянути її фрагмент і кількість коментарів на сторінці.

### Знімок екрана

![Зворотна сторона розділу картки Confluence](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Прив’яжіть сторінки Confluence до карток Trello, щоб працювати зі вмістом, стратегією та ідеями прямо в Trello.

listings.description:
Bazen Trello’daki işinize biraz daha bağlam kazandırmaya ihtiyaç duyuyor musunuz? Confluence Cloud Power-Up’ı, çalışmanızın ardındaki ayrıntıları bir Trello kartında sunmanıza yardımcı olur ve proje tamamlandıktan sonra neler olduğunu tekrar kontrol etmek için kalıcılık sağlar. Confluence, blog gönderileri ve toplantı notlarından proje gereksinimlerine kadar her şeyi oluşturmanıza ve bir karttaki her görevi destekleyen bir şekilde işi organize etmenize olanak tanır.

Confluence sayfaları gerçek zamanlı yorumları destekler ve Confluence sayfanızın ne kadar etkin olduğunu görmek için Trello kartınızın arkasını kolayca kontrol edebilirsiniz. Ekler, gömülü medya ve web bağlantıları Confluence sayfalarının güzel ve ilişkili görünmesine yardımcı olur. Projelerinizin Trello panosundan kolayca erişilebilir tüm ihtiyaç duyulan bilgileri içerebilmesi için Trello kartlarınızdan Confluence sayfaları oluşturun.

- Trello kartlarına Conflence Cloud sayfaları ekleyin ve tek bir tıklama ile panonuzdan ayrıntılı içeriğe ulaşın.
- Kartın hemen arkasından, kod parçacığı ve sayfadaki yorum sayısı dahil olmak üzere sayfayı kimin ne zaman oluşturduğuna dair sayfa etkinlik bilgilerinin tamamını görün.
### Ekran Görüntüsü
![Kart Confluence bölümünün arkası](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: İçerik, strateji ve fikirleri doğrudan Trello'da yürütmek için Trello kartlarına Confluence sayfaları ekleyin.

listings.description:
บางครั้งคุณต้องการเพิ่มบริบทสักเล็กน้อยไปในงานของคุณใน Trello หรือไม่ Confluence Cloud Power-Up จะช่วยให้รายละเอียดด้านหลังงานของคุณบนการ์ด Trello และเนื้อหาหลักในการย้อนดูสิ่งที่เคยเกิดขึ้นหลังโปรเจกต์เสร็จ ตั้งแต่โพสต์ในบล็อก โน๊ตการประชุม จนถึงความต้องการสำหรับโปรเจกต์ Confluence ช่วยให้คุณสามารถสร้างอะไรก็ได้และจัดระบบงานที่สนับสนุนแต่ละงานบนการ์ด

หน้า Confluence รองรับการแสดงความคิดเห็นแบบเรียลไทม์และคุณสามารถตรวจสอบด้านหลังของการ์ด Trello ของคุณได้อย่างง่ายดายเพื่อดูว่าหน้า Confluence มีการใช้งานอย่างไร ไฟล์แนบ สื่อแนบ และลิงก์สู่เว็บช่วยทำให้หน้า Confluence สวยงามและสำคัญ สร้างหน้า Confluence จากการ์ด Trello ของคุณ เพื่อให้โปรเจกต์คุณมีข้อมูลที่จำเป็นทั้งหมดตลอดเวลา พร้อมใช้งานได้ง่ายจากบอร์ด Trello ของคุณ

- แนบหน้า Confluence Cloud ไปกับการ์ด Trello และรับตั้งแต่บอร์ดของคุณไปจนถึงเนื้อหาแบบเจาะลึกของคุณในคลิกเดียว
- ดูกิจกรรมในหน้าของคุณทั้งหมด ใครสร้างหน้าเมื่อใด รวมทั้งข้อมูลโดยย่อและจำนวนความคิดเห็นในหน้าได้จากด้านหลังของการ์ด

### ภาพหน้าจอ

![ด้านหลังของการ์ดส่วน Confluence](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: แนบหน้า Confluence ไปกับการ์ด Trello เพื่อจัดการเนื้อหา กลยุทธ์ และแนวคิดใน Trello

listings.description:
Behöver du ibland lägga till lite mer kontext för ditt arbete i Trello? Confluence Cloud Power-Up hjälper till att ge detaljerna bakom ditt arbete på ett Trello kort och att se vad som hände efter det att projektet är klart. Från blogginlägg, till mötesanteckningar, till projektkrav, låter Confluence dig skapa någonting, och organisera det arbete, som stöder varje uppgift på ett kort.

Sidor för Confluence stöder realtidskommentarer, och du kan enkelt kontrollera baksidan av ditt Trello kort för att se hur aktiv din Confluence sidan är. Bilagor, inbäddade medier och webblänkar hjälper till att göra Confluence sidor vackra och relevanta. Skapa Confluence sidor från dina Trello kort, så att dina projekt alltid har all information som behövs, lätt tillgänglig, från ditt Trello kort.

– Bifoga Confluence Cloud sidor till Trello kort, och hämta från din tavla och ta till ditt innehåll med ett enda klick.
– Se all aktivitet på din sida, vem som skapade en sida och när den skapades, inklusive ett utdrag och antalet kommentarer på sidan, direkt från kortbaksidan.

### Skärmdump

![Baksidan av kortets Confluence sektion](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Bifoga Confluence sidor till Trello kort för att hantera innehåll, strategi och idéer direkt i Trello.

listings.description:
Вам когда-нибудь казалось, что задачам в Trello не хватает контекста? Улучшение Confluence Cloud создано именно для таких случаев. Добавляйте на карточку подробные сведения и возвращайтесь к ним даже после завершения проекта. Confluence помогает упростить работу над задачами и сопроводить ее необходимыми материалами, будь то записи в блоге, заметки со встреч или требования к проекту.

Confluence позволяет оставлять комментарии в реальном времени. Узнать текущий статус работы можно на обратной стороне карточки Trello. Чтобы страницы Confluence оставались интересными и актуальными, добавляйте к ним вложения и ссылки.

— Прикрепляйте к карточкам Trello страницы Confluence Cloud и переходите к нужному контенту одним нажатием.
— Просматривайте на обратной стороне карточки сведения обо всех действиях на странице, о том, кто и когда ее создал, а также о количестве комментариев.

### Скриншот

![Раздел Confluence на обратной стороне карточки](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listings.name: Confluence Cloud
listings.overview: Свяжите страницы Confluence с карточками Trello, чтобы управлять контентом, стратегией и идеями прямо на досках.

listings.description:
Existem momentos nos quais você precisa adicionar um pouco mais de contexto ao seu trabalho no Trello? O power-up do Confluence Cloud ajuda você a incluir os detalhes do seu trabalho em um cartão do Trello e oferece a possibilidade de rever o que aconteceu depois da conclusão do projeto. O Confluence possibilita que você crie qualquer item, como publicações de blog, anotações de reuniões e requisitos de projetos, e organize o trabalho que complementa cada tarefa de um cartão.

As páginas do Confluence são compatíveis com comentários em tempo real, e você pode conferir facilmente o verso do seu cartão do Trello para ver o nível de atividade da sua página do Confluence. Anexos, mídia incorporada e links da web ajudam a tornar as páginas do Confluence modernas e relevantes. Crie páginas do Confluence nos seus cartões do Trello para que seus projetos tenham sempre todas as informações necessárias disponíveis facilmente no seu quadro do Trello.

- Veja toda a atividade da sua página, quem a criou e quando ela foi criada, incluindo um snippet e o número de comentários da página, diretamente no verso do cartão.

Dodatek Power-Up Confluence Cloud pozwala dodać więcej szczegółów do zadań związanych z kartą Trello i ciągłość, aby móc sprawdzić dalszy rozwój po zakończeniu projektu. Dodatek Confluence Cloud pomaga utworzyć wpisy na blogu, notatki ze spotkania i wymagania dotyczące projektu oraz zorganizować pracę związaną z każdym z zadań.

Strony Confluence Cloud obsługują komentarze w czasie rzeczywistym i dają możliwość sprawdzenia aktywności strony na odwrocie karty Trello. Załączniki, wbudowane pliki multimedialne i łącza sprawiają, że strony Confluence Cloud są atrakcyjne i zawierają niezbędne informacje. Strony Confluence Cloud można tworzyć z poziomu karty Trello, aby informacje o projekcie były zawsze łatwo dostępne z tablicy Trello.

– Dołączanie strony Confluence Cloud do kart Trello i przechodzenie jednym kliknięciem z tablicy do treści.
– Podgląd aktywności strony, przez kogo i kiedy została stworzona, w tym wycinek i liczba komentarzy na stronie widoczne na odwrocie karty.

Met de Confluence Cloud Power-Up kun je meer achtergrondinformatie op een kaart zetten en na afloop van het project altijd bekijken wat er precies is gebeurd. Van blogposts tot notulen van vergaderingen en projectvereisten, met Confluence kun je van alles toevoegen en het werk dat nodig is voor elke taak op een kaart structureren.

Op Confluence-pagina's kun je in realtime opmerkingen plaatsen en je kunt op de achterkant van je Trello-kaart gemakkelijk zien hoe actief je Confluence-pagina is. Bijlagen, ingesloten media en weblinks helpen je om Confluence-pagina's aantrekkelijk en relevant te maken. Maak Confluence-pagina's aan voor je Trello-kaarten, zodat alle noodzakelijke informatie beschikbaar is voor je project en eenvoudig toegankelijk is via je Trello-bord.

- Voeg Confluence Cloud-pagina's toe aan Trello-kaarten en ga met één klik van je bord naar de relevante achtergrondinformatie.
- Bekijk op de achterkant van de kaart alle activiteit op je pagina, wie een pagina heeft aangemaakt en wanneer, met inbegrip van een fragment en het aantal opmerkingen op de pagina.

Trenger du noen ganger å legge litt mer kontekst til arbeidet ditt i Trello? Confluence Cloud Power-Up`en er med på å vise detaljene bak arbeidet ditt med et Trello-kort og muligheten til å se hva som skjedde etter at prosjektet er fullført. Fra blogginnlegg, til møteanmerkninger, til prosjektkrav, Confluence lar deg lage noe og organisere arbeidet som støtter hver oppgave på et kort.

Confluence-sider støtter kommentarer i sanntid, og du kan enkelt sjekke baksiden av Trello-kortet for å se hvor aktiv Confluence-siden din er. Vedlegg, innebygde medier og nettlenker er med på å gjøre Confluence-sider vakre og relevante. Lag Confluence-sider fra Trello-kortene dine, slik at prosjektene dine alltid har all nødvendig informasjon, lett tilgjengelig fra Trello-tavlen.

– Fest Confluence Cloud-sider til Trello-kort og gå fra tavlen til det nedfestede innholdet med et enkelt klikk.
– Se all aktiviteten på siden din, hvem som opprettet en side og når den ble opprettet, inkludert et utdrag og antall kommentarer på siden, rett fra kortbaksiden.

Confluence ページはリアルタイムコメントをサポート。Trello カードの裏をチェックすれば、Confluence ページの有効性を確認できます。添付ファイルや埋め込みメディア、ウェブリンクを使って美しく、内容の濃い Confluence ページを作りましょう。Confluence ページは Trello カードから作成できるため、プロジェクトには常に必要な情報が揃い、Trello ボードから簡単にアクセスできます。

- Confluence Cloud ページを Trello カードに添付して、ボードから詳細なコンテンツにワンクリックでアクセス。
- 誰がページを作成し、いつ作成されたかど、ページのすべてのアクティビティをカードの裏面から確認。スニペットやページのコメント数なども含まれます。

Confluence ti permette di creare qualsiasi cosa, dai post del blog alle note delle riunioni, fino ai requisiti dei progetti, e organizzare il lavoro a supporto di ogni attività sulla scheda.

Le pagine Confluence supportano i commenti in tempo reale e puoi controllare agevolmente il retro della scheda di Trello per visualizzare quanto sia attiva la pagina Confluence. Gli allegati, i file multimediali integrati e i link web sono utili per rendere bellissime e rilevanti le pagine Confluence.  Creale dalle tue schede di Trello, in modo tale che i progetti abbiano sempre tutte le informazioni necessarie, facilmente accessibili dalla bacheca di Trello.

- Allega le pagine Confluence Cloud alle schede di Trello e passa dalla bacheca ai contenuti approfonditi con un solo clic.
- Visualizza tutta l’attività sulla tua pagina, chi l’ha creata e quando, incluso un frammento e il numero di commenti presenti sulla pagina, direttamente dal retro della scheda.

Néha szükséged van arra, hogy több kontextust biztosíts a munkáidhoz? A Confluence Cloud Power-Uppal Trello-kártyákon részletezheted a munkákat, és az adatokat a projekt befejezése után is megtekintheted. A blogbejegyzésektől kezdve a megbeszélések jegyzetein át a projektkövetelményekig a Confluence segítségével bármilyen tartalmat létrehozhatsz, és kártyákon rendszerezheted a munkafolyamatok feladatait.

A Confluence-oldalak támogatják a valós idejű hozzászólásokat, és a Trello-kártyáid hátlapjára pillantva azonnal láthatod, hogy milyen aktív a Confluence-oldalad. A mellékleteknek, a csatolt médiának és a webes hivatkozásoknak köszönhetően a Confluence-oldalak tetszetősek és relevánsak lesznek. Hozz létre Trello-kártyáidból Confluence-oldalakat, így projektjeidhez mindig elérhető lesz az összes szükséges információ közvetlenül a Trello-táblákból.

- Csatolj Confluence Cloud-oldalakat a Trello-kártyákhoz, és egyetlen kattintással eljuthatsz a tábláktól a részletes tartalmakig.
- Jelenítsd meg az összes tevékenységet az oldaladon közvetlenül a kártyák hátoldalán – azt, hogy egy oldalt ki és mikor hozott létre, valamint egy kódrészletet és az oldalon található hozzászólások számát.

listings.description:
Vous ressentez parfois le besoin d'ajouter un peu de contexte à vos tâches dans Trello ? Le Power-up Confluence Cloud vous permet d'indiquer les informations de votre choix et les conserve de manière permanente afin que vous les retrouviez une fois le projet terminé. Que ce soit des articles de blog, des notes de réunion ou des prérequis pour un projet, Confluence vous permet de créer tout ce dont vous avez besoin et d'organiser ce contenu qui contribue aux tâches de chaque carte.

Les pages Confluence peuvent recevoir des commentaires en direct, et vous pouvez facilement consulter le dos de votre carte Trello pour surveiller l'activité de votre page Confluence. Grâce aux pièces jointes, aux fichiers multimédias intégrés et aux liens Web, vos pages Confluence sont agréables et pertinentes. Créez des pages Confluence depuis vos cartes Trello pour avoir toutes les informations nécessaires à portée de main et les retrouver facilement sur votre tableau Trello.

- Joignez des pages Confluence Cloud à vos cartes Trello pour accéder à tous les détails en un clic depuis votre tableau.
- Suivez toutes les activités sur votre page directement au dos de votre carte, notamment son auteur, sa date de création, un extrait de la page et le nombre de commentaires qu'elle comporte.

Täytyykö sinun joskus lisätä hieman kontekstia työhösi Trellossa? Confluence Cloud Power-Upin avulla saat tiedot työstäsi Trello-kortille ja voit myös aina tarkistaa tapahtumat sen jälkeen, kun projekti on valmis. Aina blogijulkaisuista kokousmuistiinpanoihin ja projektin vaatimuksiin, Confluencen avulla voit luoda mitä tahansa ja järjestää kortissa jokaista tehtävää tukevat työt.

Confluence-sivut tukevat reaaliaikaisia kommentteja ja voit helposti tarkistaa Confluence-sivusi aktiivisuuden Trello-korttisi takapuolelta. Liitteiden, upotetun median ja verkkolinkkien avulla Confluence-sivut ovat kauniita ja asianmukaisia. Luo Confluence-sivuja Trello-korteistasi niin, että projekteillasi on aina kaikki tarvittavat tiedot, jotka ovat helposti saatavilla Trello-taulustasi.

- Liitä Confluence Cloud -sivuja Trello-kortteihin ja siirry taulustasi yksityiskohtaisiin sisältötietoihin yhdellä napsautuksella.
- Näe kaikki sivusi tapahtumat, kuka loi sivun ja milloin se luotiin, mukaan lukien katkelman ja sivulla olevien kommenttien määrän, suoraan kortin takapuolelta.

¿A veces tiene que añadir algo más de contexto sobre su trabajo en Trello? El Power-Up Confluence Cloud le permite aportar todos los detalles sobre el trabajo en una tarjeta de Trello, así como revisar todo el progreso una vez que el proyecto esté terminado. Con Confluence, puede crear cualquier cosa y organizar el trabajo de cada tarea en una tarjeta diferente, ya sean entradas de blog, notas de las reuniones o requisitos del proyecto.

Las páginas de Confluence admiten comentarios en tiempo real, y usted puede comprobar con facilidad el nivel de actividad que presenta la suya en el reverso de su tarjeta de Trello. Los adjuntos, los archivos multimedia incrustados y los enlaces hacen que las páginas de Confluence sean más útiles y vistosas. Cree páginas de Confluence a partir de sus tarjetas de Trello para que sus proyectos tengan siempre toda la información necesaria y se pueda acceder a ella desde su tablero de Trello.

- Adjunte páginas de Confluence Cloud a las tarjetas de Trello y pase del tablero al contenido completo con un solo clic.
- Consulte toda la actividad que se ha realizado en su página, quién creó cada página y cuándo lo hizo, así como un fragmento de código y el número de comentarios de la página sin salir del reverso de la tarjeta.

Müssen Sie Ihrer Arbeit in Trello manchmal etwas mehr Kontext hinzufügen? Mit dem Confluence Cloud-Power-Up erhalten Sie detaillierte Informationen zu Ihrer Arbeit an einer Trello-Karte und können permanent nachlesen, was nach Abschluss des Projekts geschehen ist. Mit Confluence können Sie von Blog-Beiträgen über Besprechungsnotizen bis hin zu Projektanforderungen alles erstellen und die Arbeit organisieren, die jede Aufgabe auf einer Karte unterstützt.

Confluence-Seiten unterstützen Echtzeitkommentare und Sie können ganz einfach auf der Rückseite Ihrer Trello-Karte nachlesen, wie aktiv Ihre Confluence-Seite ist. Anhänge, eingebettete Medien und Weblinks tragen dazu bei, Confluence-Seiten ansprechend und relevant zu gestalten. Erstellen Sie Confluence-Seiten aus Ihren Trello-Karten, sodass Ihre Projekte immer alle erforderlichen Informationen haben und auf Ihrem Trello-Board leicht verfügbar sind.

– Hängen Sie Confluence Cloud-Seiten an Trello-Karten an und erreichen Sie mit nur einem Klick vom Board aus die Details Ihrer Inhalte.
– Zeigen Sie alle Aktivitäten auf Ihrer Seite an, wer eine Seite erstellt hat und wann sie erstellt wurde, einschließlich eines Ausschnitts und der Anzahl der Kommentare auf der Seite, direkt von der Kartenrückseite.

listing.description:
# Finish tasks in just one click like never before ✅

💚 FREE to go
💡 Fits any team and process
⚡️ Easy to set up
🤖 Advanced PRO features

![Demo](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/automation.webp)

## What is it about?
Card Done provides a small but **powerful button** you’ve been waiting for! Not only does it complete your Trello card in *one click*, but it can do handy *automation* for you, like moving the card to a specific list, selecting the card position, completing checklists, and doing whatever you want with the due date. The best part is that the product has been in active development all this time, and we still have a lot of features to implement, stay tuned! 😉

🎉 Card Done was [awarded](https://www.bluecatreports.com/blog/power-up-stats-2023) as one of the FASTEST GROWING free power-ups in 2023

🎉 Card Done was [awarded](https://www.bluecatreports.com/blog/power-up-stats-2022/) as the 2d joint FASTEST GROWING power-up of 2022

😎 Card Done was featured at [How I Trello](https://trello.substack.com/p/one-trello-button-to-rule-them-all) as "One Trello button to rule them all!"

## Enhance your workflow with our solutions!
Try [Tables & Spreadsheets](https://trello.com/power-ups/65c7808c749e34145008f9b4) to create tables directly within your Trello cards 🦖
Try [Statuses & Workflow](https://rebrand.ly/card-status-cd-store) to manage Trello card statuses and workflow in depth 🧞‍♂️

## How does it work?
Our solution is ready to go right after setup. Just use it. Really!
![Done button demo](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/done-button.webp)

### Wanna configure it? You are welcome!
![Settings demo](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/settings.webp)

---

# PRO subscription
We designed a PRO subscription to extend the core features of the power-up and add a lot of QOL into everyday use. From now on you can use Analytics, Clean up, Custom Button, Triggers, Mobile apps support, and even more to come!

*Note:* only board admins can manage subscriptions.

## Pricing
Card Done is **FREE** forever with the core features included.

Monthly – **2.9 USD/month** per board for the PRO features along with unlimited usage.
Annual – **29 USD/year** (2 months for free) per board.

🤹 We provide *20% discount* if you have the PRO subscription on 5 boards and more!

## Analytics 📊
With a PRO subscription, you can track your cards completion rate daily / weekly / monthly. Currently there are two charts: total completion and per-member completion.

![Analytics](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/charts.gif)

## Clean up 🧹
Always wanted to keep your completed cards simple? It's exactly what the "Clean up" section is designed for:

* Auto-remove labels/members/due date from a finished card;
* Archive or Delete a finished card with ease.

![Clean-up demo](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/clean-up.gif)

## Custom Button 🎨
Do you want the Button to fit your process perfectly? Customize it 😉

You can change all the aspects of the Button: title, name, and color. We support all ten Trello default colors including transparent "grey". 

![Custom Button](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/custom-button.gif)

## Triggers. With desktop and mobile apps support 🤖
Did you know that you can finish your cards with just a swipe? Or by completing the due date on the front of a card? All of that is included in the PRO subscription, and you don't have to open a card to finish it!

Just to mention – **it works like a charm on mobile apps**, so yes – you are fully equipped!

### Swipe trigger

Just swipe a ticket to a list with finished cards - it will do the trick!

![Swipe trigger](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/swipe-trigger.gif)

### Due date completion trigger

Mark a due date as completed to automatically complete a card - it's that easy!

![Due date completion trigger](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/due-date-trigger.gif)

---

# Roadmap
We are excited to continue working on Card Done power up and here is **the plan**:

![Roadmap](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/roadmap.jpg)

**We will add new features as soon as milestones are met**. It depends on the number of boards to which the power-up is connected. In this way, we can learn from you, analyze your interest in the Card Done power-up, and grow wisely with excellent quality!

If you want to help us deliver faster, please share the power-up with your fellows!

## Let's talk!
[![Feedback](https://card-done.nyc3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/images/store/feedback.png)](https://hqgmk389di2.typeform.com/to/QUSg0ny0?utm_source=trello-store&utm_campaign=v2&subscription=free)

Have feedback? Found a bug? Looking for support? Interested in a partnership? Good start!
Shoot us an email at carddone@thundermodules.com

## Release history

- 2.8.2: Stability improvements, bug fixes *(June 2024)* 🛠
- 2.8.1: Stability improvements, bug fixes *(Mar 2024)* 🛠
- 2.8.0: Subscription packages *(Dec 2023)* 📦
- 2.7.0: Annual subscriptions added *(Nov 2023)* 🕛
- 2.6.0: Major pack of bug fixes along with stabilization and scalability improvements *(Oct 2023)* ⚙️
- 2.5.0: Email subscriptions: Product updates and Promotions *(July 2023)* 💌
- 2.4.2: Security improvements; Minor bug fixes *(June 2023)* 🛠
- 2.4.1: Minor authorization bug fixes *(May 2023)* 🛠
- 2.4.0: **Quality of Life 2**: Ability to achieve/delete a finished card; Members chart for Analytics *(Mar 2023)* 🧹📊 
- 2.3.0: **Completion pack**: Leave a finished card in the same list; Auto-remove labels/members/due date *(Mar 2023)* 🔁 
- 2.2.0: Analytics bug fixes, including optimizations *(Feb 2023)* 🛠📊
- 2.1.0: Major security updates *(Jan 2023)* 🛠 
- 2.0.0: **PRO features**: Analytics, Custom Button, Triggers, Mobile apps support *(Nov 2022)* 📊🎨🤖
- 1.3.0: Non-disturbing notifications to keep you updated with the latest features and plans *(Oct 2022)* 🔔
- 1.2.0: Auto-complete checklists of a finished card *(Aug 2022)* ✅
- 1.1.0: Complete a due date of a finished card by default; Security improvements; Minor bug fixes *(Jun 2022)* 🛠
- 1.0.0: **Card Done is launched** *(May 2022)* 🎉

listing.name: Confluence Cloud
listing.description:
Do you sometimes need to add a bit more context to your work in Trello? The Confluence Cloud Power-Up helps provide the detail behind your work on a Trello card and the permanency to revisit what happened after the project is done. From blog posts, to meeting notes, to project requirements, Confluence let’s you create anything and organize the work that supports each task on a card.

Confluence pages support real-time comments and you can easily check the back of your Trello card to see how active your Confluence page is. Attachments, embedded media, and web links help to make Confluence pages beautiful and relevant.  Create Confluence pages from your Trello cards, so your projects always have all the information needed, easily available from your Trello board.

- Attach Confluence Cloud pages to Trello cards and get from your board to your drilled-down content in a single click.
- See all the activity on your page, who created a page and when it was created, including a snippet and the number of comments on the page, right from the card back.

### Screenshot

![Back of card Confluence section](https://confluence.trello.services/images/cello-screenshot-2.png)
listing.overview: Attach Confluence pages to Trello cards to manage content, strategy, and ideas right in Trello.

listing.name: Google Drive
listing.description:
The Google Drive Power-Up for Trello brings your files and folders to Trello cards. Search Google Drive right from Trello and attach relevant files and folders. See real-time previews and details and click back into Google Drive.

- Built in file search lets you attach folders and files from Google Drive to a Trello card on any version of Trello.
- See real-time information and previews for any Google Drive files or folders attached to cards.

![screenshot](https://google-drive.trello.services/images/screenshots/Google_Drive_5.jpg)
listing.overview: Access your Drive files for a project directly from its card, or create and attach new Drive files to a card.

cards.desc:
The user sees no errors regarding data types or query constraints during common demo lines of questioning.

- the query engine is blocking Common Table Expressions (CTEs) or non-SELECT statements
- SUM(CAST(o.amount AS FLOAT))
- the `close_date` field is stored as text rather than a timestamp. I’ll convert `close_date` to a timestamp before filtering and aggregating
- the error occurred due to use of CTEs (WITH statements), which aren't supported in the current environment.
- There’s a technical limitation with subqueries and table aliases in this environment.
- the system doesn't allow deeply nested subqueries with re-aliasing of the same table names in multiple subqueries
